commands_run: coord claim core-axiom-package-receipt "Next narrow lane after PR #3174: add package/install receipt around Mac+Android core-axiom native pair with binary/source checksums, adb-forward channel timing, and remote cleanup proof; avoid sensor/mesh/BML/compiler lanes."
failure_reason: Extended the Mac+Android core-axiom native runner to emit package-latest.json with script/source/binary/channel-receipt SHA-256s, channel duration, sample window, Android device metadata, and remote cleanup status. The live package receipt passed on SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a with channel_duration_ms=156 and remote_cleanup=pass. The package Form band returns 4095 four-way.
